name: What can I do this week to improve Google Assistant visibility?
description: Update your Google Business Profile, rewrite your top FAQs, and fix the most obvious speed or schema issues first.

mainEntity.name: What can I do this week to improve Google Assistant visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you need quick wins, focus on your Google Business Profile, your highest-traffic pages, and the questions customers ask most often. If you have more time, add deeper schema, improve mobile speed, and build topic clusters around your main services.
acceptedAnswer.description: Update your Google Business Profile, rewrite your top FAQs, and fix the most obvious speed or schema issues first.
